☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ In the grand scheme of the multiverse, anything was possible. Things that some species regarded as fleeting thoughts were the reality of another society. If it could be thought of, then it existed somewhere. Perhaps one would never see how that idea had come to fruition but it certainly affected someone somewhere. It’s similar to the concept of alternate realities. If there’s a possibility of something happening then there’s a reality where it happened.

One such example would be.. ugh, soulmates. Bill thought it was stupid, but it’s not like he could deny they existed when he himself was born with one. More specifically, he was born with an annoying little voice in the back of his head telling him to find his soulmate and cherish them like the most priceless of treasures. But why should he do that? No, it was much more fun to do whatever he wanted What reason could he possibly have to seek out the one being that could tie him down? It was a laughable idea all around. ❞
